name: 黑宣冥 (Hēi Xuān Míng) Nezha 1979 movie ver.
description: Hei Yan is the first son of the Jade Emperor, if it can be considered as such since he was a failed creation of the emperor, the emperor when trying to join the two energies ying and yang to create his first son and future heir to the throne, due to a small error caused the yang energy to escape, but by preventing it from doing so, the ying energy began to form with all its darkness, thus forming Hei Yan, who was only pure black mist together, until the goddess Nüwa built him a body that he could change at his convenience if he wanted.
creator: Yan yang
